productName: Legit Gold Infused Pre-roll Godfather OG 1g
description: This infused indica pre-roll wraps Godfather OG flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of earthy, pungent, and pine, with a heavy, relaxed body calm. A little goes a long way.
